hooks.command: bash -c 'cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && echo "refs/heads/hook $(git rev-parse HEAD) refs/heads/hook 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" | ./.githooks/pre-push'
bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.rs ]]; then cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'
